slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University is a multidisciplinary institution combining art, design, science, and technology to educate future thought-leaders. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto University is a multidisciplinary institution combining art, design, science, and technology to educate future thought-leaders.

slides.layoutHint: Use high-contrast text on images showing campus architecture or scientific equipment to maintain WCAG AA compliance.
mustInclude: Aalto operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, and Science, fostering creative sustainability.

slides.layoutHint: Use high-contrast text on images showing diverse campus activities or open events to maintain WCAG AA compliance.
mustInclude: Aalto offers open university courses and lifelong learning opportunities accessible to everyone regardless of background.
